name: Equitas Tiga Credit Card
exclusions: Fuel transactions (surcharge waiver only, no reward points)
additionalBenefits: Pay by 3: Eligible transactions at select merchants (TATA Cliq, Netmeds, Skull Candy, 1% Club, etc.) auto-converted into 3-month low-cost EMI
Introductory interest rate of 0.99% per month for first 3 months from card issuance
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period on regular purchases
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between Rs 500 and Rs 3,000 (up to Rs 100 per month)
Complimentary air accident cover, credit shield, and lost card liability insurance
additionalDetails: 3X reward points on UPI payments, contactless (tap-to-pay) transactions, and Pay-by-3 partner merchant spends
Base earn rate: 1 reward point per Rs 100 on all other spends
Reward points redeemable on Equitas Xchange portal (xchange.equitasbank.com) for products, vouchers, and travel

salaried: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval
selfEmployed: Subject to Equitas Small Finance Bank credit approval

internalNotes: Card details verified from official Equitas Bank archived page (Wayback Machine snapshot Nov 2025) on 2026-06-15.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Reward value: 1 RP = Rs 0.10 for cashback/statement credit; Rs 0.15 for products/vouchers on Xchange portal.
Pay-by-3 merchants include: TATA Cliq, Tony & Guy, SLAM, Netmeds, Skull Candy, 1% Club, Prashanti Sarees, Wedtree, Lectrix.
Annual fee waiver threshold of Rs 1.2 lakh per anniversary year (as per sources; verify against latest MITC).
First year joining fee may be waived under promotional/bank conditions.
Finance charges: 3.75% per month (45% per annum) on revolving balances.
Cash advance fee: 2.5% or Rs 250 whichever is higher.
